tests.name: test_e2e07_company_has_lhdn_credentials

tests.name: test_e2e01_employees_exist

tests.name: test_e2e03_salary_components_have_amounts

tests.description: E2E-05: Salary Slip has earnings and deductions child tables.

tests.name: test_e2e06_salary_slip_employee_link_valid
tests.description: E2E-06: Salary Slip's employee link resolves to a real Employee.
